post.x-request-examples-description-1: 开启名为“dws-test-12”,且集群ID为52e42b4f-90de-40c2-91f6-31d7728f6a32细粒度告警订阅,并选择地址为“urn:smn:cn-north-7:4cf650fd46704908aa071b4df2453e1e:dws-test-nodelete”的SMN消息主题“dws-test-nodelete”。
